title: Diceratella elliptica
taxonomy: Diceratella elliptica is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. This family includes a wide range of species, from mustard greens to cabbage and broccoli. The Brassicaceae family is further classified into several subfamilies and tribes, with Diceratella elliptica being a part of one of these subfamilies. The exact classification of Diceratella elliptica can be further broken down into its kingdom, phylum, class, order, and family levels.
